locations.name: 安地斯山脈

locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

relations.subject: Amazonian motmot

relations.subject: Amazonian motmot
relations.evidence: pilcomajensis — southern Bolivia, southern Brazil, and northwestern Argentina Throughout its range the Amazonian motmot inhabits the interior and edges of humid lowland forest
